headlines.title: US negotiators to return to Pakistan for talks as Trump repeats threat to Iran's infrastructure
headlines.summary: President Trump says the US will hit Iran's power plants and bridges if a deal isn't reached.

headlines.title: Strait of Hormuz closed again, Iran says, as ships attacked
headlines.summary: At least two merchant vessels hit by gunfire attempting to cross the strait. India summoned the Iranian ambassador over shooting incidents involving Indian-flagged ships.

headlines.title: Iran rejects ceasefire, demands permanent end to war
headlines.summary: Iran conveyed its response to the U.S. proposal via Pakistan, rejecting a ceasefire and emphasizing necessity of permanent end to the war.

headlines.title: Iran war fallout spreads to copper and nickel supply chains
headlines.summary: After disrupting global aluminium markets, the Iran war's economic impact is now affecting copper and nickel supply chains.

headlines.title: North Korea fires ballistic missiles into the sea
headlines.summary: North Korea accelerates missile launches amid Iran war tensions and talk of possible meetings with U.S. and South Korea.

headlines.title: At least six killed in Kyiv as gunman opens fire and takes hostages
headlines.summary: Attacker took hostages inside a supermarket, killed after shoot-out with police.

headlines.title: Zelensky condemns US extension of Russian sanctions waiver
headlines.summary: US argues waiver meant to ease energy supply crunch sparked by US-Israel war with Iran.

headlines.title: French President Macron to renew Greece security pact
headlines.summary: Macron will travel to Greece next week to renew security pact between the two countries against backdrop of Iran war.

headlines.title: Hungary election winner Peter Magyar's Tisza party increases supermajority
headlines.summary: Tisza party increases parliamentary supermajority to 141 seats out of 199 after processing postal and foreign votes.

headlines.title: Rat poison found in HiPP baby food jar in Austria
headlines.summary: Product recalled from 1,500 SPAR supermarkets; police say consuming purées may be potentially life-threatening.
